description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu 22.04 CI that runs on push to main and tags, and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job in a ubuntu:22.04 container with a matrix of LLVM versions 11, 13, 14, and 15. The job should install software, checkout sources with submodules, detect package metadata, run a CI task with ansible-playbook, and publish or move a package depending on the presence of a Cloudsmith API key.
